about.title: Meet CarDeals
about.subtitle: We are experts in importing vehicles from the USA, and our passion and knowledge in this field have been growing since 2015.

reviews.empty: There are no reviews in this category yet.

auctions.title: Auctions
auctions.text: Our company has been purchasing and transporting cars from the United States since 2015. Since then, we have successfully imported thousands of vehicles from different parts of North America. In addition to cars, we also import motorcycles, ATVs and jet skis. We serve private clients, dealers and wholesale buyers.
auctions.textSecond: Thanks to our long-term cooperation with foreign companies, we can guarantee the best agreed rates for sea and land transport. At CarDeals, we focus on transparent and convenient purchasing, so transport costs are known before placing a bid. Our website includes a calculator that estimates the total transaction cost and helps avoid hidden fees.

seaShipping.title: Ocean shipping
seaShipping.text: We work with reliable transport companies that have warehouses in Newark, Chicago, Houston and Los Angeles. This helps quickly deliver vehicles to the port and ship them by sea.

customs.title: Customs clearance
customs.text: At the port of Rotterdam, CarDeals works with customs agencies to keep the clearance process moving without delays.

homeDelivery.title: Home delivery
homeDelivery.text: After arrival in Europe, the vehicle can be delivered along the selected route to your city.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: We are waiting for your message - choose the most convenient communication method below!

chat.title: Online chat
chat.text: Get a quick answer from our team.

phone.title: Call us
phone.text: Talk to a purchase and delivery manager.

message.title: Send a message
message.text: Write to us and we will prepare a detailed reply.

contact.supportNote: CarDeals support is available to active platform users for important details about bidding, purchasing and vehicle delivery.

location.title: Our location
location.text: We work throughout the European Union. By clicking the point, you can see our main office and build a route.

team.title: Our team
team.text: Our professional team of managers is always ready to help you deliver your dream car quickly and reliably.

faq.processQuestion: Is the process of buying and importing cars through CarDeals complicated?
faq.processAnswer: The car purchase process through the CarDeals platform is simple and transparent. The key requirement is basic website navigation skills, including placing auction bids, paying a deposit, and making international transfers in USD and EUR through your own bank. We handle all formalities for the client: communication with the auction house, documents, transport in the USA, container loading and unloading, customs clearance and delivery to the specified address.
faq.biddingQuestion: Do I personally participate in live bidding when using your service, or does CarDeals bid on my behalf?
faq.biddingAnswer: When using our service, you do not bid live personally. Instead, you delegate the bid on our website by entering the maximum amount you are ready to offer on the selected vehicle page. This amount is confidential and visible only to CarDeals before the auction starts. If your amount is high enough, we represent your interests during the live auction within your maximum bid.
faq.calculatorQuestion: Is the fee calculator available on the CarDeals website accurate?
faq.calculatorAnswer: The calculator gives an estimated import cost based on available auction and logistics data. The final cost can change because of exchange rates, bank fees, storage, late payment penalties, or document-related fees.

support.title: Support and Consultation
support.q1: How can I contact CarDeals support?
support.a1: You can contact support through online chat, email, or phone. Our team helps with platform use, bidding questions, payments, documents, and delivery updates.
support.q2: Can CarDeals help me choose a vehicle?
support.a2: CarDeals provides tools, vehicle data, and consultation, but the final purchase decision, budget, and risk assessment remain with the client.
support.q3: Can I get additional information about a vehicle?
support.a3: Available vehicle data is shown on the lot page. If reports or additional photos are available, support can help you find them before bidding.
support.q4: Do you inspect vehicles before the auction?
support.a4: Physical inspection depends on location and availability. Many auction vehicles are sold as-is, so photos, history reports, and auction descriptions should be reviewed carefully.
support.a5: Bid cancellation depends on auction status and timing. Contact support as quickly as possible, because live auction bids may become binding.

delivery.title: Delivery, Shipping, and Documents
delivery.q1: How much does it cost to import a vehicle?
delivery.a1: The total import cost depends on the auction price, auction fees, inland transport in the USA, ocean shipping, customs clearance, taxes, port handling, and delivery to the final address.
delivery.a2: Yes. After the vehicle reaches Europe and customs procedures are completed, CarDeals can organize delivery to the address selected by the client.
delivery.q3: To which ports do you ship vehicles?
delivery.a3: Vehicles are usually shipped to major European ports used by CarDeals logistics partners. The destination port depends on country, route availability, and the best current transport option.
delivery.q4: When will I receive the vehicle documents?
delivery.a4: Documents are prepared and transferred after the auction house releases them and all required payments are completed.
delivery.q5: Where can I check the vehicle status?
delivery.a5: The vehicle status can be checked in your CarDeals account. Important updates are also sent by the support team.
delivery.q6: Can I request additional inspections or photos of the vehicle at the port terminal?
delivery.a6: Additional photos or inspection requests may be possible depending on the terminal and vehicle location.
delivery.q7: Is it possible to use your export services for vehicles that were not purchased directly through CarDeals?
delivery.a7: In selected cases, CarDeals can help with export or logistics for vehicles purchased outside the platform.

formal.title: Formal Aspects and Rules
formal.q1: What rules do I need to accept before bidding?
formal.a1: Before bidding, you need to register, accept platform terms, place the required deposit, and agree to pay for any vehicle you win.
formal.q2: Is signing a separate contract required?
formal.a2: In most cases, accepting the platform terms during registration is enough. Additional documents may be requested for company purchases or specific transactions.
formal.q3: Who is responsible for checking vehicle condition?
formal.a3: Auction vehicles are sold according to auction information and photos. The buyer should review all available data before placing a bid.
formal.q4: Can the seller reject my winning bid?
formal.a4: Some lots require seller approval. The seller can accept, reject, or counter the offer after the auction.
formal.q5: What happens if payment is late?
formal.a5: Late payment may cause penalties, storage fees, cancellation, or account restrictions depending on auction and platform rules.

payments.title: Payments and Related Questions
payments.q1: How do I pay for a won vehicle?
payments.a1: After winning, you receive payment instructions with the amount, bank details, and transfer title. Payment is usually made by international bank transfer.
payments.q2: Which currency is used for payment?
payments.a2: Auction vehicle payment is usually made in USD. Logistics, service fees, and European costs may be calculated separately in EUR.
payments.a3: Bank transfer fees are usually charged by the client bank and are not included in the auction invoice.
payments.a4: Vehicle payment normally requires bank transfer. Some smaller platform-related payments may depend on available payment methods.
payments.q5: When do I pay the CarDeals commission?
payments.a5: The CarDeals commission is paid separately according to the instructions provided after the vehicle is purchased.

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.a1: The deposit confirms serious bidding intent and unlocks the ability to place bids. It also protects the platform against unpaid winning bids.
deposit.a2: Yes, the deposit is refundable if there are no unpaid winning bids, active transactions, or unresolved obligations on the account.
deposit.q3: How much deposit do I need?
deposit.a3: The required deposit depends on the maximum bid amount. A higher bid limit usually requires a higher deposit.
deposit.q4: Can I use one deposit for several bids?
deposit.a4: You can place bids according to your available deposit limit, but every won auction creates a purchase obligation.
deposit.q5: How do I request a deposit return?
deposit.a5: Contact support from your account and request a refund. The team will check whether the account has no active obligations.

deliveryTimes.title: Current delivery times
deliveryTimes.subtitle: Data is automatically updated based on completed shipments.

steps.label: From vehicle / documents arrival at terminal to container loading*
From container loading to vessel departure
From vessel departure to vessel arrival

ny.name: New York Terminal
ny.status: Goods arrive in New York fairly quickly after purchase. Loading time may vary, but once loaded, vessels depart promptly and reach the destination within an average timeframe.

sv.name: Savannah Terminal
sv.status: Goods arrive in Savannah fairly quickly after purchase. Loading doesn't take too long, but vessel departure wait times can vary significantly. The sea voyage may take a considerable amount of time.

hs.name: Houston Terminal
hs.status: Houston provides fast cargo handling. The terminal operates in standard mode without significant delays.

la.name: Los Angeles Terminal
la.status: The Port of Los Angeles is the largest in the USA. Minor delays are possible during peak periods; otherwise normal operations.

in.name: Indianapolis Terminal
in.status: The Indianapolis inland terminal operates as a distribution hub. Delivery times are stable.

rt.name: Rotterdam Terminal
rt.status: Rotterdam is the largest port in Europe. High throughput capacity and excellent logistics infrastructure.

pre.heroSubtitle: Interested in importing cars from the USA? Read our guide on how the car buying process works on our site. We explain everything important step by step. US auctions will no longer be a mystery to you.
pre.introTitle: 4 steps to buying a car with CarDeals
pre.introP1: To make the process of importing cars from the USA clear and transparent, we created CarDeals. Auctions are held without intermediaries, without hidden costs — you make all the decisions yourself! You choose the car and the amount you are willing to pay, and we help you win the auction! Important: there are no costs in CarDeals until you win the bid.
pre.introP2: Registration and participation in the auction are free! We only require a refundable deposit to secure your bids! CarDeals makes it quick and easy to order, buy and deliver cars, including door-to-door delivery. CarDeals is 100% transparency and full control over the location of your car.

steps.title: Find your dream car
body: Choose from over 450,000 listings. Our search engine and detailed filters will help you easily find the car you need in our database. You don't need to create an account at CarDeals to browse cars and auctions.
An account is only needed to participate in the auction. The registration process is simple and will take no more than 5 minutes.
steps.listTitle: After creating an account you will also get:
list: The ability to add cars to your watchlist.
Access to prices of archived listings.
steps.footer: Every month we add new convenient features for our users.

steps.title: Make a refundable deposit
body: A refundable deposit is required to participate in auctions — this is a requirement of auction houses (Copart and IAAI). We do not charge a commission for participating in auctions. If you change your mind — the deposit can be returned at any time.
After the deposit is credited, you can place bids on the same day. If you win, the funds are frozen for the amount of the car. If you lose — they are automatically returned.
list: Starter plan — deposit $300; bids up to $50,000; up to 5 cars at a time.
Professional plan — deposit $3,000; bids up to $500,000; up to 10 cars.
Corporate plan — deposit $20,000; bids up to $200,000; up to 20 cars.

steps.title: The auction starts — feel the excitement of bidding!
body: Specify the maximum amount you are willing to pay for the car. The CarDeals calculator will show a preliminary list of expenses. The car will be put up for auction on your behalf.
US auctions take place in two stages:
list: Pre-Bids — placed several days before the start, open 5 days before the main auction.
Live auction — starts from the highest pre-bid. The one who offered more wins.
steps.footer: CarDeals represents you at the live auction within your set maximum. This allows you to buy a car at the lowest possible price.

steps.title: Pay for the car and wait for it to arrive!
body: After winning the auction, you will receive bank transfer details and payment instructions. After the funds are credited, we will pick up your car and take care of all the formalities.
We will be in touch throughout the entire transportation process. You can track the status of the car in your personal account — we take care of customs clearance and all related procedures.
All you need to do is wait for your new car to be delivered right to your door!
Go to the 'After purchase' tab to read a detailed action plan after winning the auction, including all import stages.

steps.title: Car bid accepted
steps.description: After winning the car and logging into the CarDeals personal account, the auction status changes to "Car won". This means the bid was accepted — it's time to open a bottle of champagne!
steps.imageCaption: 2015 Audi S3 — "Car won" status on CarDeals

steps.title: Payment for the car
steps.description: After winning the auction, within a few hours, an SMS and email are sent with a screenshot from the auction house confirming the car win.
steps.quote: You won 2015 Audi S3 #483982. Payment details have been sent to your email address. Please ensure timely payment.
steps.extra: The email contains the amount to be paid in USD (bid amount + auction fees), transfer description, and an attachment with account number, SWIFT number, bank address, etc.
steps.imageCaption: Unpaid invoice on the auction platform

steps.title: Payment receipt confirmation
steps.description: Once the funds arrive at the auction house account, an SMS is sent confirming receipt of payment. The car pickup request is automatically forwarded to the transport company.
steps.quote: We have recorded your payment for 2015 Audi S3 and arranged its pickup from the auction house.

steps.title: Car transportation updates
steps.description: The "Transport" tab in the CarDeals personal account provides information about:
bullets: Car pickup from the auction house,
Car delivery to the shipping terminal,

steps.title: Photos from the shipping terminal
steps.description: Photo documentation of the car from the shipping terminal is available a few days after its arrival.
steps.quote: Photos of 2015 Audi S3 have been sent to your email address.

steps.title: Car delivery to Europe
steps.description: In the "Transport" tab, the car status is updated with departure and arrival dates, container number and a map showing the location of the container ship.

steps.title: Transportation cost calculation
steps.description: Within a few days after shipping to Europe, a report on car carrier and freight costs with transfer details is provided. Payment is made in USD to a US account.
steps.quote: Transportation calculation for 2015 Audi S3 has been sent to your email address. Please make payment within 72 hours.

steps.title: Customs clearance form
steps.description: A few days before the car arrives in Europe, a customs clearance form is sent for entering the necessary data (private or fiscal processing), car delivery information and transport document details.
steps.quote: Customs clearance authorization for 2015 Audi S3 has been sent to your email address. Please fill in the form within 3 days.

steps.title: CarDeals commission fee
steps.description: A few days before arrival in Europe, a link to pay the CarDeals service fee is sent. Payment can be made via instant bank transfer or credit card (Stripe-based).
steps.quote:
Your car is on its way and will soon arrive at the port in Europe. Expected arrival date is Monday, December 11, 2023. Please make payment for our logistics services:

https://payments.bid.cars/en/fee/WAULC68E14A227038/482925780

Best regards, CarDeals.

steps.title: Customs clearance invoice
steps.description: After customs clearance, an email is sent with an invoice to be paid in EUR directly to the customs agency account.
steps.quote: Customs clearance for 2015 Audi S3 has been sent to your email address. Please make payment within 72 hours.
steps.extra: Note: Transfer in EUROS (€), not US dollars. A storage fee of 15 EUR per day or more may apply.

steps.title: Car pickup notification
steps.description: An SMS is sent indicating that the logistics service has scheduled car pickup from Rotterdam for a specific day.
steps.quote: Pickup of 2015 Audi S3 from Rotterdam port is scheduled for Friday (2023-12-16). Confirmation will be sent separately. Pickup date may change.

steps.title: Car pickup confirmation
steps.description: After the car is picked up, an email and SMS are sent with pickup confirmation, transport company phone number and amount due.
steps.quote: 2015 Audi S3 has been picked up from the port. CarDeals transport company (+48 726 099 099). The driver will contact you regarding delivery. Please prepare 450 EUR — cash payment to the driver.

steps.title: Car document scans
steps.description: After the car is picked up, scans of vehicle documents are automatically sent to your email address.
steps.extra: Original documents will be sent by GLS courier within 2 weeks after pickup. In special cases up to 30 days. Documents are sent from our office at least once a week.

steps.title: Documents arrival at office
steps.description: When documents arrive at the office, an SMS notification is sent. After assembly they are sent by UPS / GLS / DPD courier service.
steps.quote: Original documents for 2015 Audi S3 have arrived at our office. Dispatch with translations by UPS / GLS / DPD courier will take place within 5 business days.

steps.title: Document dispatch confirmation
steps.description: Upon dispatch, an SMS notification is automatically generated informing about the shipment.
steps.quote: Documents for 2015 Audi S3 are scheduled for dispatch on Thursday (2023-12-21). DPD courier (1000667692324U).

steps.title: CarDeals service completion
steps.description: Completion of CarDeals service means successful completion of all transaction stages — from winning the auction to delivering the car and documents. Clients can count on support at every step.
steps.extra: CarDeals ensures full transparency and provides detailed service reporting, guaranteeing clarity and honesty.
